announcement.title: 🌸 Mother's Day — Applecrumb signs off your timesheet
announcement.body: 48 hours of 2x rewards because somebody around here had to remember the birthdays. New MYTH-tier support hero — Applecrumb, wife of TBFAM, the only person in C-suite who actually answers her email. Limited Mother's Day Bouquet bundle in the Shop tab. Don't forget to call.

shop.title: Mother's Day Bouquet
shop.description: Floral PowerPoint deck included. 1200 💎 gems, 150 ✦ shards, 8 🎫 access cards, and 2 free summon credits for the Mother's Day banner. One-time per account.
